title: Fix GoJS Evaluation Watermark on Metrics Lineage Viewer
description:
## Context
The metrics lineage viewer in production is showing the GoJS evaluation software watermark, indicating the license key needs to be applied to this specific viewer component.

## Fix
Apply the GoJS license key to the metrics lineage viewer in production to remove the watermark.
acceptance_criteria: GoJS evaluation watermark is removed from the metrics lineage viewer
License key is properly applied in the production environment for the lineage viewer
ux_changes: Removed GoJS evaluation watermark from the metrics lineage viewer in production.
implementation_notes: GoJS license key needed to be applied to the metrics lineage viewer component separately from the ERD. Fixed on production.
comment_summary: Developer fixed the issue on production and shared a screenshot confirming the watermark is removed.
